tools.name: estimate_data_usage
tools.description: Estimate trip mobile data usage in GB with a breakdown by activity. Pure estimation; no state changes.

tools.description: Compare connectivity strategies and recommend a plan type with a checklist. Compares options only; no transactions.

tools.description: Get network coverage summary, common issues, and suggested settings for a destination. Knowledge base; no side effects.
